title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: src/books.ts:17-46 implements POST handler with title, author, year, isbn fields

title: GET /books endpoint with author filter
evidence: src/books.ts:48-61 implements GET /books with LIKE query support for ?author=

title: GET /books/:id endpoint
evidence: src/books.ts:63-76 implements GET /books/:id with 404 handling for missing books

title: PUT /books/:id endpoint
evidence: src/books.ts:78-122 implements PUT with partial update support and validation

title: DELETE /books/:id endpoint
evidence: src/books.ts:125-138 implements DELETE returning 204 No Content

title: SQLite storage
evidence: src/database.ts imports better-sqlite3, creates books table with CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
Input validation for required fields
evidence: src/books.ts:21-25 validates title required, src/books.ts:24-25 validates author required

title: Working source code in workspace
evidence: Source exists and tests pass (17 tests), but npm run build fails: Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js'
suggestion: The runtime is broken; TypeScript must be regenerated or node_modules fixed. Tests pass but build cannot produce dist/

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md exists with prerequisites, setup, running (dev/prod), and test instructions

title: TypeScript build fails
evidence: npm run build: Error Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js' in node_modules/.bin/tsc
suggestion: node_modules corruption; regenerate with npm install

title: No linter configured
evidence: npm run lint not defined in package.json scripts
suggestion: Consider adding eslint or similar for code quality
